prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `342ae2ed`.
codex_response:
Implemented `342ae2ed` as a new ARC2 task package. The verifier groups same-color objects and fills the shortest valid straight corner-to-corner segment between each pair; the generator stays in-family by sampling sparse `16x16` orange-background grids with 3-5 color pairs of matching `2x2` or `3x3` squares and non-overlapping diagonal connectors. The summary hint was usable and consistent with the official examples, so I did not add `notes.md`, and no new primitive was needed.

Validation passed end to end: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, artifact build succeeded, and the preview sheet looks on-distribution.
